## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reversible.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated README, `.env.example`, or other docs for configuration changes.
- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, `.data/`, `dist/`, `node_modules/`, logs, credentials, chat ids, local absolute paths, or attachment files.
- [ ] I ran `bun run check`.
